Copied from [http://sliekas.org/basara/gusdocs/doku.php/main:modding_docs:lua:networkparticleevent here].

====== Class NetworkParticleEvent ======
===== See also: =====
[[Lua global#network_particle_event|network_particle_event]], [[Lua global#network_particle_event|network_particle_event]]

===== send =====
(available from version 0.9c)

<pre>
 send(particle, [data[, connection[, mode[, rules]]]])
</pre>

Sends a particle event to one or more computers.

//particle// is the [[Lua particle|Particle]] object to [[#send]] the event on.

See [[Lua networkgameevent#send|Lua:networkgameevent#send]] for documentation of the other parameters.

<!-- imported from Wayback Machine: https://web.archive.org/web/20130523211648/http://www.openlierox.net:80/wiki/index.php/Lua:networkparticleevent -->
